title: ContextBundleItem
description: A single item in a Context Assembler bundle. Adopts MCP Resource schema as base + Continue ContextItem.content + assembler extensions. Per R4 NR-2: scoring uses content-hash, no embeddings.

uri.description: Unique identifier per MCP Resource spec. Format: <scheme>://<source-ref>. E.g., jira://WIN-7102, github://playsweeps-web/pull/4821, atom://playsweeps-web/2026-05-21-pilot-1-WIN-7993.

description.description: Hint for LLM (MCP Resource field, optional).

mimeType.description: MCP Resource field, optional. E.g., text/markdown, application/json.

content.description: Resolved text content (Continue.dev ContextItem.content field). Injected into downstream LLM.

source.description: Which connector produced this item. v1 uses jira/github/atoms only; others reserved for v2+.

source_ref.description: Entity reference within source (e.g., 'WIN-7102', 'playsweeps-web#4821'). Optional but recommended.

fetched_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when this item was retrieved.

approved.description: Set true at Phase 3 user review. Items with approved=false cannot be handed off.

relevance_score.description: Computed via content-hash + keyword-overlap + recency-decay (R4 NR-2). NO embeddings in v1.

relevance_reason.description: Why this item scored as it did. E.g., 'exact-ticket-match', 'keyword-overlap-jaccard-0.6', 'recency-30d'.

conflict_marker.description: True if this item contradicts another item in the same bundle. User decides at Phase 3 review.

evidence_quality.description: Per source-routing-table.md provenance. verified=primary MCP call success; degraded=fallback search; partial=no-daemon filesystem-grep.

evidence_quality_reason.description: Frozen enum per Oracle PR 2 S-1. Add new values via schema_version bump only.

mcp_used.description: Exact MCP tool name used. Required for replay determinism (Boundary 4).

query_issued.description: Canonical JSON of the query args. Required for replay determinism.

extensions.description: Source-specific freeform fields (Metis R1 escape valve). Promoted to typed schemas as connectors stabilize.
